stemHtml: An aircraft has had modifications done to it that were known. 3 years have passed since it was last weighed. Does it need to be reweighed?

options.a: According to EU-OPS, it doesn't have to be reweighed.
options.b: It has to be reweighed after every modification.
options.c: It has to be reweighed every 12 months.
options.d: It has to be reweighed in 6 years time.
